header.description: P-51 wings-level pitch program that pins the B2 flight-path-angle integrator and the pitch<->energy coupling. Settle at 1 g, then pull g=1.8 (nose rotates up, gamma climbs, altitude is earned, induced drag + gravity bleed speed = a zoom climb), then push to g=0.3 (nose drops, gamma goes negative, the dive rebuilds speed), then back to 1 g. Stays well inside +/-90 deg so the cos(gamma)->0 vertical singularity is never approached. NEW golden for B2 (seal v1.6r0).
